options.name: Psychic
options.description: A mortal with natural gifts — telepathy, telekinesis, clairvoyance.

options.name: Thaumaturge
options.description: A mortal who practices ritual magic — ceremonial or folk.

options.name: Faithful
options.description: A mortal whose faith grants genuine divine protection and sight.

options.name: Sleepwalker
options.description: Instinctively understands magic without Awakening — resistant to disbelief.

powers.label: Supernatural Merits
powers.description: Choose supernatural Merits worth up to 5 dots total from Second Sight. These are in addition to your normal 7 Merit dots.

items.name: Mediumship
items.description: Communicating with ghosts and ephemeral entities.

items.name: Mind of a Killer
items.description: Reading psychic residue of violence at a scene.

items.name: Postcognition
items.description: Seeing echoes of past events at a location.

items.name: Pyrokinesis
items.description: Creating and controlling fire through psychic force.

items.name: Telekinesis
items.description: Moving objects with the power of the mind.

items.name: Telepathy
items.description: Reading and projecting thoughts into other minds.

items.name: Thaumaturgic Ritual
items.description: Ritual magic that takes time but produces real effects.
